name: Auditable Source-to-Skill Compiler
objective: Turn customer-authorized material into a bounded candidate Skill structure with traceable source, rights, citation, confidence, and applicability records.
non_goals: No document ingestion, OCR, full-text copying, private corpus, automatic Skill creation, or external upload.
inputs: Future customer-approved source manifest with rights and citation boundaries.
outputs: Future source index, glossary, pattern inventory, confidence labels, and bounded candidate outline.
excluded_patterns: Knowledge-base, context-pack, and planning workflows remain partial mappings until their inputs and outputs are separately evidenced.
known_gaps: The proposal is locked, has no parser or model, and does not validate any source transformation.
